questionHtml: Use further iterations of Euler’s method to find the long-term population for each species of squirrel from these initial values.
markschemeHtml:
number of brown squirrels go down to 0, 
black squirrels to a population of 3000        A1

[1 mark]

meta.title: Use further iterations of Euler’s method to find the long-term population for each species of squirrel from these initial values.
